description_long: This is a large, single-story residential house with a sprawling rectangular footprint and a prominent, multi-sectioned hip roof in shades of gray. The structure features a main building with several roof ridges and dormers, and an attached covered walkway leading to a detached garage or outbuilding. The front facade includes a covered porch with steps and columns, while the rear of the house opens to a landscaped yard with a patio, garden features, and a circular structure that may be a gazebo or water tank. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with some larger panes and bay-style projections. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, likely stucco or painted siding, with contrasting dark roof tiles and trim.
description: A large, single-story house with a multi-hipped roof, covered porch, detached garage, and landscaped rear yard. The exterior is light-colored with symmetrical windows and a prominent entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch with steps, columns, and the covered walkway leading to the detached garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, rectangular profile, multiple roof ridges, and the connection between the main house and the garage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the landscaped yard, patio area, garden features, and a circular structure adjacent to the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extended roofline, additional windows, and the overall length of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with some bay windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, columns, and a prominent overhang
